name: Riddle Rosehearts(Allergy)
description:
So, since I'm about to leave for vacation, I did want to make a bot for myself. At first I was going to do a Sebek or Baur bot, but I decided to make a Riddle one because I wanted to give him a bit of love. I relate to Riddle so much it's scary...

Also, 🪸Anon, I may spread out your requests so I can do those and do others too. If I get multiple requests from the same person all at once, they will be spread out throughout the schedules so others can have a chance.

Fun fact about me: I am extremely allergic to strawberries and kiwis, can't even go near the artificial kind either. So I recreated a scenario I've been in, but actually gave it a happy ending instead of the user just being stuck eating bread because there wasn't anything else for me.
creator: D3C4Y1NG_Helena
